name: Apex Land Surveying and Mapping LLC
description: Experienced land surveyor in Colorado Springs and beyond with over 30 years of experience.

name: Gould Land Surveying
description: Land surveying company licensed in Colorado and Arizona, serving Colorado Springs, Woodland Park, El Paso County, Teller County, and Park County with boundary surveys, ALTA, plats, subdivisions, easements, and right-of-ways using GPS and robotic total stations.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Ken and his team conducted thorough and accurate surveys with a sincere and honest approach
They found a pin that 3 other surveyors missed and adhered to their timeline and budget
Answered the phone - BIG PLUS! Ken was able to schedule in a timely manner

sentiment.summary: Gould Land Surveying has an exceptional reputation with uniformly positive reviews praising their professionalism, accuracy, reliability, and superior customer service under Ken's leadership.
